description: As the IT administrator for a visual effects studio, migrate users from legacy 3D software licenses to new 2024/2025 versions. Create a new license for 'Autodesk Maya 2025' (15 seats, Manufacturer: 'Autodesk', Category: 'Graphics Software', Product Key: 'MAYA-2025-CORP', Purchase Cost: '$12,500.00') and another for 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' (10 seats, Manufacturer: 'Maxon', Category: 'Graphics Software', Product Key: 'C4D-2024-CORP', Purchase Cost: '$8,400.00'). For the legacy 'Autodesk Maya 2023' license, check out one seat of the new 2025 version to every user currently assigned to the 2023 version, then check in all 2023 seats and rename the legacy license to 'Autodesk Maya 2023 - Retired'. Perform the same migration for 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25' users to the new 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' license, checking in all R25 seats and renaming that legacy license to 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25 - Retired'. Ensure no legacy seats remain checked out and that only users previously assigned to legacy versions receive exactly one seat of the corresponding new software.
